description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with reinforced metal brackets on each corner, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The wood panels are horizontally aligned, showing a natural grain and a medium brown finish, while the metal brackets are dark gray with visible rivets for added strength. Cut-out handles are present on the shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The box is open at the top, with no visible lid or cover, making its contents easily accessible. The interior is spacious and matches the exterior wood finish, suitable for storing various items. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, ideal for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor markets.
description: A sturdy rectangular wooden storage box with metal corner reinforcements and cut-out side handles, open at the top for easy access. The box features a natural wood grain and industrial metal accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long wooden side with two metal corner brackets and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a short wooden panel with a cut-out handle and prominent metal brackets on both corners.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a long wooden panel and metal corner reinforcements, no handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a short wooden panel, cut-out handle, and metal corner brackets.
